pages.text: The $(item)Spirit Map$() is a map that shows you the locations of nearby Spirit Vein Centers.
$(bold)Usage:$()$(br)$(li)Right-click to create or open the map$(li)Spirit Vein Centers appear as $(bold)red markers.$()

You can also use the $(bold)/locate poi magic_ritual_mod:spirit_vein_center$() command to quickly find the nearest Spirit Vein Center. The Spirit Map is useful for finding multiple veins at once and planning your base.
